---
title: "Rural Insights Dataverse"
subtitle: "Center on Rural Innovation (CORI)"
format: html
---

> Preview index — not part of the built site (managed by Next.js).

### Packages

- [ruraldefinitions](packages/ruraldefinitions/index.md)
- [cori.data.bds](packages/cori-data-bds/index.md)
- [cori.data.fcc](packages/cori-data-fcc/index.md)

### Datasets

- [American Community Survey](datasets/american-community-survey/index.md)
- [BEA Real GDP](datasets/bea-real-gdp/index.md)
- [Census BDS](datasets/census-bds/index.md)
- [Census BFS](datasets/census-bfs/index.md)
- [Census Building Permits](datasets/census-building-permits/index.md)
- [Census PEP Components](datasets/census-pep-components/index.md)
- [Census Population Estimates](datasets/census-population-estimates/index.md)
- [FCC Broadband](datasets/fcc-broadband/index.md)
- [IRS Migration](datasets/irs-migration/index.md)
- [QCEW Employment & Wages](datasets/qcew-employment-wages/index.md)
- [USDA County Typology](datasets/usda-county-typology/index.md)
- [USPTO Patents](datasets/uspto-patents/index.md)
